evals.name: file-versioning-system
evals.prompt: Design a 'File Versioning System' based on REQ-042. Users should be able to revert files to previous states and see a history of changes.
evals.expected_output: A complete DES-042 document follows the 4-tier methodology.

assertions.name: mermaid_er_diagram
assertions.description: Must include a Mermaid ER diagram showing File and FileVersion entities.

assertions.name: service_layer_definition
assertions.description: Must define a VersioningService in backend/app/services/.

assertions.name: component_reuse
assertions.description: Must explicitly mention re-using 'ConfirmAction' or 'DataTable' from common components.

assertions.name: error_handling_schema
assertions.description: Must list at least 3 custom exceptions (e.g., VersionNotFoundError).
